narrative:
30 Ohio Senate district has 215,508 registered voters, with 57.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.7%, a modest Republican lean of 3.5 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -4.9% D−R vs -3.1% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
